name: Infinite 8
author: Poki
description: Infinite 8 is a skill game where you have to navigate your car over the tracks without hitting the borders! Keep drifting to increase your score. Once you have a nice race going, the bar will glow blue and you'll gain more points for every round, and you're able to hit the sides once.  About the creator: Infinite 8 was created by Zonda Creative Studios, they are known for Crane Madness and Barbershop Inc. both playable here on Poki!
